results.rendered_html: sāt ind. A Taddhita affix added to a word to show that something is completely changed into the thing expressed by that word, or that it is left at the complete disposal or control of that thing; bhasmasāt bhū ‘to be completely reduced to ashes’; agnisātkṛtvā  M. 5 ; bhasmasātkṛtavataḥ pitṛdviṣaḥ pātrasācca vasudhāṃ sasāgarāṃ  R. 11. 86 ; vibhajya merurna yadarthisātkṛtaḥ  N. 1. 16 ; so brāhmaṇasāt, rājasāt &c.;  Śi. 14. 36.
